ruleset.name: NotNull4J Rules
ruleset.description: PMD rules for NotNull4J library enforcement. Ensures @LocalNotNull variables are only assigned via runtime-safe NotNull methods.

rule.name: LocalNotNullUsageRule
rule.message: @LocalNotNull variable must be assigned using NotNull runtime-safe methods
rule.description:
Enforces that @LocalNotNull variables are initialized and reassigned only via NotNull methods that provide runtime null-safety guarantees.
Allowed methods: - Fail-fast: verify, orThrow, orGet, orThrowOptional, orGetOptional - Graceful: orDefault, orDefaultOptional, orLog, orLogOptional - Normalizers: listOrEmpty, setOrEmpty, mapOrEmpty, stringOrEmpty
Not allowed: - Direct assignment from nullable sources - Methods that return @Nullable (orLogGet, orNull) - Methods that return Optional instead of T (optional)
